case_title: ANA PAULA SJOBON VERAS ET AL VS. KEIONNA PAYTEON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2016 - JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN TO DEFENDANT THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY: AN APPLE SPORT WATCH - SERIAL #FHJQHJ30GR79. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $450.00 FILED BY VERAS, ANA PAULA SJOBON GROVE, PAYER AS TO DEFENDANT PAYTEON, KEIONNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VERAS, ANA PAULA SJOBON GROVE, PAYER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAYTEON, KEIONNA $150.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $220.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN TO DEFENDANT THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY: AN APPLE SPORT WATCH - SERIAL #FHJQHJ30GR79. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00) SERVED AUG-29-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PAYTEON, KEIONNA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-14-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-14-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS ANA VERAS AND PAYER GROVE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
